name: phlo/tech
description: Full-stack web framework with its own .phlo language: express backend logic, routing, HTML views, scoped CSS and single-page behavior in one concise file format that compiles to plain PHP, CSS and JS.

suggest.ext-pdo: Required by the DB resources (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite)
suggest.ext-gd: Required by the icon sprite builder (build config key: icons)
